created_by.description: Comma-separated list of creator user ids. Returns only actions created by these users.

limit.description: Maximum number of actions to return. Omit to return all.

offset.description: Number of actions to skip before returning results.

ordering.description: Field to order by (name, created_at, pinned_at, created_by). Prefix with '-' for descending.

search.description: Case-insensitive substring match on the action name.

tags.description: JSON-encoded array of tag names, e.g. ["billing","beta"]. Returns actions having any of these tags.
